name: ultrasearch
description: Recap everything the web says about a topic — fan out keyless web search across many backends, fetch + dedupe sources into an evidence dossier, and write a citation-checked, tiered report (with self-contained HTML) in five research modes, plus an agentic deep-research tier (decompose, merge, adversarially verify). A skills.sh agent skill.

scripts.check:build: tsup && node scripts/copy-bundle.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- scripts/ultrasearch.mjs skills/ultrasearch/scripts/ultrasearch.mjs && node scripts/verify-skill-bundle.mjs
scripts.demo: node scripts/ultrasearch.mjs gather --q "what is rate limiting" --mode topic --backends fixture --out /tmp/ultrasearch-demo

author: maxgfr
